Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Jul-07-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for hearing on the Petition to Approve the Compromise of a Disputed Claim of a Minor.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

James S. Bostwick, Esq. appeared with petitioner Suzanne Struckman, who was present as Guardian ad litem for the minor Isabelle Struckman, who was also present at today's hearing.
R. Wesley Pratt, Esq. appeared on behalf of defendant Rosenbaum, Bernsten & Wright.

On the basis of evidence received, and good cause appearing. the Petition is granted and compromise is approved.

Settlement Amount - $200,000.00.
Attorney's Fees - $48,605.96.
Reimbursement for care provided by parents to the minor - $29,817.89.
Costs - $5,676.15.

The net balance of $115.000.00 shall be used to purchase an ANNUITY as described in Exhibit A of the Order Approving the Compromise of a Disputed Claim of a Minor.

Order Approving the Compromise of a Disputed Claim of a Minor was submitted to and signed by the Court.
